examples: Ultrasound showed she was expecting twins.
I had an ultrasound scan to see how the pregnancy was progressing.
Most women will be offered an ultrasound scan during pregnancy, although it's not obligatory.
Elliptic's ultrasound technology uses sound waves and microphones to detect movement, similar to how radar detects objects.
The ultrasound requests are not related to maternity care, but to diagnose illnesses in patients.
